name: affinity-mcp
description: Local Codex connector for Affinity by Canva's MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Control Affinity through its local MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Affinity by Canva's local MCP server on localhost:6767. It forwards Affinity's script, SDK documentation, rendering, and script-library tools through a small local proxy. Created by ChatGPT Codex under debad's supervision.
defaultPrompt: List the scripts installed in Affinity.
Help me write an Affinity script.
